title: HBJSP Pocket Hugs Heart, Thinking of You Gifts, Keepsake Gifts for Women Friends, Go to University School Positive Good Luck Birthday Wedding Christmas Mothers Day Valentines (Multicolor)
features: 💌【Adorable Heart-shaped Ornaments】Pocket hug heart is a exquisite keepsake to decorate, little pocket hug heart token comes with an encouraging message card. Hug love heart contain deep feelings and meanings for friendship or love, Use a small heart hug to make others always think of you, and will bring a smile to the person you care about.

💌【Positive Gift】Pocket hugs heart have helped you ease your anxiety, and it's definitely worth it if you need a little comfort throughout the day. I believe that when you see your pocket hugging your heart hugging you, you will instantly become happy and heal all your unhappiness.

💌【Convenient To Carry】The mini heart-shaped pocket hug are made of high quality material, The size is 3.9cm*4.2 cm. Our lovely a little pocket love heart hug size is suitable, fits in to your palm of the hand or pocket. No matter they find a new job, travel, move or go to school, you can send your missing to your family and friends as a gift to express your love and represent good luck.

💌【Ideal Back to School Gift】 The ideal good luck card to pair with new school gifts for a girl or boy. our delicate school heart gifts have upward meanings, which are suitable for parents and teachers to give to children and classmates in the beginning of the school season to express their best wishes.

💌【Thinking of You Gift】The little love heart comes with box and pocket hug card, a exquisite souvenirs and meaningful gift for your loved ones, friends and family, reminding them that you are always with them even if they don't see each other often. the perfect gift also for a little boy, little girl! Will be your child's favorite cuddling partner.
